context: Tests whether the agent can correctly identify multiple configuration errors in a broken @adobe/aio-lib-telemetry setup: invalid import paths, wrong exporter class names, incorrect config nesting, invalid sdkConfig properties, wrong auth header name, wrong ENABLE_TELEMETRY value, and missing ENABLE_TELEMETRY for one action.

checklist.name: Invalid import path identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/exporters` is not a valid import path and the correct path is `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`

checklist.name: Wrong exporter class names identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `OTLPTraceExporter`, `OTLPMetricExporter`, `OTLPLogExporter` do not exist and the correct names are `OTLPTraceExporterProto`, `OTLPMetricExporterProto`, `OTLPLogExporterProto` (or Http/Grpc variants)

checklist.name: serviceName at wrong level identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `serviceName` is placed at the top level of the config object instead of inside `sdkConfig`

checklist.name: Invalid exporters property identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `exporters: { traces, metrics, logs }` is not a valid `sdkConfig` property — each signal type must be configured separately via `traceExporter`, `metricReaders`, `logRecordProcessors`

checklist.name: Wrong auth header name identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `Authorization: Api-Key ...` is wrong for New Relic — the correct header is `"api-key": params.NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY`

checklist.name: ENABLE_TELEMETRY case issue identified
checklist.description: Identifies that `ENABLE_TELEMETRY: TRUE` (uppercase) will not work — the value must be lowercase `true`

checklist.name: Missing ENABLE_TELEMETRY for update-inventory
checklist.description: Identifies that the `update-inventory` action is missing `ENABLE_TELEMETRY: true` in its inputs

checklist.name: Corrected import path
checklist.description: The corrected telemetry.js imports exporters from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`

checklist.name: Corrected signal wiring
checklist.description: The corrected telemetry.js uses `traceExporter`, `metricReaders: [new PeriodicExportingMetricReader({exporter})]`, and `logRecordProcessors: [new SimpleLogRecordProcessor(exporter)]`

checklist.name: serviceName inside sdkConfig in fix
checklist.description: The corrected telemetry.js places `serviceName` inside the `sdkConfig` object
